introSection:
Jumbo Jet is a steel roller coaster currently located at Chelyuskintsev Park in Minsk, Minsk, Belarus.

This roller coaster began operation in 1972 at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. Since then, the ride has been located at Palace Playland in Maine, USA, Malmö Folkets Park in Sweden, Beoland in Russia and Dreamland in Belarus before arriving at its current location.

sections.title: Images
sections.content: Photographs of Jumbo Jet while at Cedar Point.

fullText:
Jumbo Jet is a steel roller coaster currently located at Chelyuskintsev Park in Minsk, Minsk, Belarus.

This roller coaster began operation in 1972 at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. Since then, the ride has been located at Palace Playland in Maine, USA, Malmö Folkets Park in Sweden, Beoland in Russia and Dreamland in Belarus before arriving at its current location.

Photographs of Jumbo Jet while at Cedar Point.
